waiting_for: Price to trigger LIMIT order at 30100 (flipped psychological support) for long entry

long_assessment.reasoning: Price has pulled back to 30099.50, essentially at the 30100 flipped psychological level (was resistance, now support). This completes the pullback we were waiting for. Strong confluence: 1) Flipped 30100 level, 2) EMA21 at 30086.70 (13.3 pts below) providing dynamic support, 3) Fresh bullish FVG at 30073.50-30081.25 (18.75-26.5 pts below) as additional support zone, 4) Strong uptrend (EMA21 > EMA75 > EMA150), 5) Stochastic pulled back to 68.62 from near-overbought, creating room for continuation. LIMIT order at 30100 captures the bounce. Stop at 30065 (35 pts) sits below both FVG zone and EMA21. Target 30200 (raw) / 30195 (final with -5 buffer) targets next psychological level. R/R = 95/35 = 2.71:1. Confidence increased from 0.65 to 0.72 as price reached the planned entry level with all confluence intact.

short_assessment.reasoning: No viable short setup. Trend remains strongly bullish (EMA21 > EMA75 > EMA150). Stochastic at 68.62 is not overbought. The only structural downside target is the bullish FVG fill at 30078.50 (final target), 21 pts below current price, but trading against the trend with a stop above recent highs (30115+) would yield <1.2:1 R/R — below 1.3 minimum. The massive bearish FVG at 30680-30756 is 650+ pts away, irrelevant for intraday. No counter-trend confluence exists.
